SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built on Nashville Stone

Cardena's Hard Landscaping started with a simple goal: to bring enduring quality and craftsmanship to Nashville properties. We're a local company, born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, and we understand the unique challenges and opportunities our climate and landscape present.

We believe in doing things right the first time. From initial consultation to final installation, we prioritize clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering attention to detail. Our commitment is to exceed your expectations and create outdoor spaces that you'll enjoy for years to come.

We're proud to be part of the Nashville community. We source local materials whenever possible, support local businesses, and actively participate in community improvement projects. Your investment in Cardena's is an investment in Nashville.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Cardena's team did an amazing job with our new patio! They helped us choose the perfect pavers to match our East Nashville bungalow, and the installation was quick and professional. We're already enjoying spending time outdoors!

Sarah M. Patio Installation
“

We had a tricky situation with a sloped backyard in Green Hills. Cardena's built a beautiful retaining wall that not only stabilized the hillside but also added a lot of character to our property. There was a minor hiccup with the initial design, but they quickly addressed it and made sure we were happy with the final result.

David B. Retaining Wall
“

Our old asphalt driveway was cracked and crumbling. Cardena's removed it and installed a new concrete driveway that looks fantastic! The crew was professional and courteous, and they cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

Jessica L. Driveway Installation
“

We love our new fire pit! Cardena's helped us design a custom fire pit that fits perfectly with our outdoor space. It's the perfect spot for relaxing with friends and family on cool evenings. The gas line installation was seamless.

Mike R. Outdoor Fire Pit
“

After a particularly heavy rain, we had major flooding in our backyard. Cardena's installed a French drain system that completely solved the problem. The team was knowledgeable and efficient, and the price was reasonable. We're very happy with the results.

Emily K. Drainage Solutions
“

Excellent work from start to finish! Cardena's transformed our backyard with a stunning new patio. Their attention to detail is incredible, and they were always responsive to our questions and concerns. We highly recommend them!

Tom S. Patio Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What materials are best for Nashville patios?
Flagstone and pavers are popular choices due to their durability and aesthetic appeal. Concrete is a cost-effective option, while locally sourced limestone offers a unique, natural look.
How long does patio installation take?
The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but most patio installations can be completed within a week or two.
Do I need a permit for a patio installation?
In some cases, a permit may be required, especially for larger patios or those that involve significant changes to the landscape. We can help you determine whether a permit is needed and assist with the application process.
